prompt_text:
### Demographics: 74-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
Cirrhosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Cirrhosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~7.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Losartan (50 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 69.6 kg; Height 165.2 cm; BMI 25.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 133/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.0%; 9 months ago 8.4%; 6 months ago 7.9%; 3 months ago 7.4%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 252mg/dL; 9 months ago 175mg/dL; 6 months ago 180mg/dL; 3 months ago 176mg/dL; current 133mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 68.9kg; 9 months ago 67.7kg; 6 months ago 68.2kg; 3 months ago 64.3kg; current 69.6kg), Height (12 months ago 165.2cm; 9 months ago 165.2cm; 6 months ago 165.2cm; 3 months ago 165.2cm; current 165.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 25.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 133mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 133mmHg; current 133mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 73mmHg; 9 months ago 74mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 96U/L; 9 months ago 90U/L; 6 months ago 94U/L; 3 months ago 88U/L; current 90U/L), AST (12 months ago 122U/L; 9 months ago 129U/L; 6 months ago 124U/L; 3 months ago 125U/L; current 120U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.9mg/dL; current 1.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 96mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 96mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 98mL/min/1.73m²; current 97mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 43mg/g; 9 months ago 31mg/g; 6 months ago 45mg/g; 3 months ago 33mg/g; current 35mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 84mg/dL; 9 months ago 84mg/dL; 6 months ago 89mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 86mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 44mg/dL; 6 months ago 45mg/dL; 3 months ago 45mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 187mg/dL; 9 months ago 189mg/dL; 6 months ago 188mg/dL; 3 months ago 168mg/dL; current 178mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 15.0g/dL; 9 months ago 15.0g/dL; 6 months ago 14.2g/dL; 3 months ago 14.9g/dL; current 14.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
